general.name: Cisco System and Kernel Extension
general.payloads: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><!DOCTYPE plist PUBLIC "-//Apple//DTD PLIST 1.0//EN" "http://www.apple.com/DTDs/PropertyList-1.0.dtd"> <plist version="1"><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>C37C1A69-B610-46F1-A8F8-1BC7FA720FD1</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>Configuration</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>C37C1A69-B610-46F1-A8F8-1BC7FA720FD1</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Cisco System and Kernel Extension </string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>PayloadRemovalDisallowed</key><true/><key>PayloadScope</key><string>System</string><key>PayloadContent</key><array><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>6237F1D7-FF7C-4D56-9544-4ABFC2F7C8BB</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.system-extension-policy</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Hudson's Bay Company</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>6237F1D7-FF7C-4D56-9544-4ABFC2F7C8BB</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>System Extensions</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>AllowUserOverrides</key><true/><key>AllowedSystemExtensions</key><dict><key>DE8Y96K9QP</key><array/></dict></dict><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>F7D03082-1A44-47C5-BB78-FCD76F3308FD</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.syspolicy.kernel-extension-policy</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Hudson's Bay Company</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>F7D03082-1A44-47C5-BB78-FCD76F3308FD</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Approved Kernel Extensions</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>AllowUserOverrides</key><true/><key>AllowNonAdminUserApprovals</key><false/><key>AllowedKernelExtensions</key><dict><key>DE8Y96K9QP</key><array><string>com.cisco.kext.acsock</string></array></dict></dict><dict><key>FilterDataProviderBundleIdentifier</key><string>com.cisco.anyconnect.macos.acsockext</string><key>FilterDataProviderDesignatedRequirement</key><string>anchor apple generic and identifier "com.cisco.anyconnect.macos.acsockext" and (certificate leaf[field.1.2.840.113635.100.6.1.9] /* exists */ or certificate 1[field.1.2.840.113635.100.6.2.6] /* exists */ and certificate leaf[field.1.2.840.113635.100.6.1.13] /* exists */ and certificate leaf[subject.OU] = DE8Y96K9QP)</string><key>FilterPackets</key><false/><key>FilterSockets</key><true/><key>FilterType</key><string>Plugin</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Web Content Filter Payload</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>E571B021-D5BE-42E5-AFAC-3F6E6AC788E8</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>JAMF Software</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.webcontent-filter</string><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>E571B021-D5BE-42E5-AFAC-3F6E6AC788E8</string><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PluginBundleID</key><string>com.cisco.anyconnect.macos.acsock</string><key>UserDefinedName</key><string>Cisco AnyConnect Content Filter</string></dict></array></dict></plist>
